title: 10 best herbal teas for flatulence
description: Cuminum cyminum, also known as cumin, teas helps with flatulence because of its carminative properties. The active compounds in cumin, such as cuminaldehyde and limonene, have been shown to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing gas and bloating. Cumin teas also stimulate digestion and improve gut motility, allowing gas to be released more efficiently. This combination of properties makes cumin teas a popular natural remedy for alleviating flatulence and promoting overall d...
